description: Standalone component-retrieval eval coverage for the active Region 1 multi-forest component inventory. Measures exact component recall, precision, applicable-standard recall, wrong-forest selection rate, and hard-negative behavior before review-scoped component compliance scoring.

cases.description: Custer Gallatin soil standard exact retrieval should select the exact standard component with no wrong-forest noise.
cases.query: new management activities shall not create detrimental soil conditions on more than 15 percent of an activity area

cases.description: Custer Gallatin air quality goal exact retrieval should prove non-standard component retrieval is measured independently from compliance scoring.
cases.query: the custer gallatin national forest cooperates with tribal federal and state agencies to meet air quality regulations as necessary

cases.description: Flathead soil standard exact retrieval should select the correct Forest Plan component and preserve applicable-standard recall.
cases.query: vegetation management activities do not create detrimental soil conditions on more than 15 percent of an activity area

cases.description: Beaverhead-Deerlodge wilderness standard exact retrieval should stay forest-correct on the active Region 1 inventory.
cases.query: commercial timber harvest is prohibited in recommended wilderness

cases.description: Generic forest-plan phrasing must not count as a component-level retrieval hit.
Broad plan-consistency phrasing must not retrieve unrelated component records.
